When suggesting commit messages:
1. Focus only on meaningful code changes
2. Never include trivial items like:
   - Version increments/bumps
   - Whitespace changes
   - Formatting-only changes
   - File renaming without content changes
   - Comment updates
3. Keep messages concise and descriptive
4. Follow conventional commit format (type: description)
5. Example transformation:
   "fix: update debug message formatting and increment version number" →
   "fix: update debug message formatting"
